_README: Benchmark filing set for the Aritiq reliability harness. 83 US filers chosen to (a) span sectors (semiconductors, software, banking, insurance, REIT subtypes, utilities, industrials, aerospace, automotive, energy, telecom, pharma, healthcare payer/provider, transportation rail/airline/parcel, fintech, spinoffs, multi-class-share structures) and (b) deliberately stress the three evidence gates: continuing-operations EPS splits, restricted cash on the cash-flow statement, and balance-sheet total-vs-current liabilities. 'stress' tags are PRIORS about what each filer is LIKELY to exercise (from general knowledge of these companies' filings), used only to bucket results for analysis. They are NOT ground-truth labels and must not be treated as such — the harness measures what the pipeline actually does, it never assumes the prior is correct. The six seed tickers from the handoff lead the list.

filings.note: Xilinx/Pensando acquisitions; segment realignment; the AMD-class continuing-ops EPS case.
